subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, Who reviveth all beings, Who createth light and darkness, and Who dispelleth the darkness of night through the light of day [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله محیی الانام و خالق النور و الظلام و ماحی ظلمه اللیالی بنور الایام
subcodes.subjects: @prayers (general or uncategorized), @transcendence; unknowability of God, @meanings of letters and numbers; jafr (gematria), @God's oneness [ahadiyyih and wahidiyyih]
